label: Cinderwall Hab Suite
description: This compact residence occupies a recessed bay within Ashenward City’s basalt-and-slagcrete hab-blocks, its loadbearing ribs fused into the continuous windbreak mass of the tiered walls. Sealed shutters and gasketed vent-grilles keep ash infiltration to a dull film across rough plascrete floors and soot-darkened fittings. A narrow alcove shrine and a hardwired vox niche sit beneath layered insulation and shielding panels, built to endure the city’s persistent atmospheric interference. Lighting remains low and violet-tinged, reflecting off vitrified wall patches where stormlight and industrial heat have glassed the surface.
